mapper.insert:
SELECT approvalDoc_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO approvalDoc ( docId, docTypeId, title, content, detailData, docStatus, writerEmpId, writerEmpName, writerDeptCode, writerDeptName, writerGradeCode, writerGradeName, regDate, submitDate ) VALUES ( #{docId}, #{docTypeId}, #{title}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detailData, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{docStatus}, #{writerEmpId}, #{writerEmpName}, #{writerDeptCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerDeptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerGradeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerGradeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, CASE WHEN #{docStatus} = 'PENDING' THEN SYSDATE ELSE NULL END )

INSERT INTO approvalLine ( lineId, docId, stepOrder, apprEmpId, apprEmpName, apprDeptCode, apprDeptName, apprGradeCode, apprGradeName, apprTypeCode, lineStatusCode ) VALUES ( approvalLine_seq.NEXTVAL, #{docId}, #{stepOrder}, #{apprEmpId}, #{apprEmpName}, #{apprDeptCode}, #{apprDeptName}, #{apprGradeCode}, #{apprGradeName}, 'APPROVER', 'WAIT' )
INSERT INTO approvalFile (fileId, docId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, regDate) VALUES (approvalFile_seq.NEXTVAL, #{docId}, #{oriFilename}, #{saveFilename}, #{fileSize}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId WHERE d.writerEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus = 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY d.docId DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalDoc d WHERE d.writerEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus = 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId WHERE d.writerEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY d.docId DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalDoc d WHERE d.writerEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId INNER JOIN approvalLine l ON d.docId = l.docId WHERE l.apprEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY d.docId DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalDoc d INNER JOIN approvalLine l ON d.docId = l.docId WHERE l.apprEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
